title: Show HN: Paca – Lightweight Jira alternative for human-AI collaboration
summary: I built Paca out of pure passion—a free and lightweight Jira alternative written in Go where humans and AI agents work together as equal teammates to plan sprints and assign tasks to each other. title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

title: Apple’s new AI photo editing tools mostly work, for better and worse

title: 英伟达H200芯片量产，AI训练成本有望降低50%
title_cn: 英伟达H200芯片量产，AI训练成本有望降低50%
summary: 英伟达宣布H200 GPU进入量产阶段，相比H100内存带宽提升1.4倍，FP8算力提升2倍，预计将使大模型训练成本降低约50%。

title: 具身智能新突破：通用机器人基础模型首次实现跨形态泛化
title_cn: 具身智能新突破：通用机器人基础模型首次实现跨形态泛化
summary: 斯坦福和伯克利联合团队发布RoboFoundation模型，首次实现从双足机器人到四足机器人的零样本技能迁移，标志着具身智能通用化的重要里程碑。

title: Mistral Releases Codestral Pro: A 22B Model That Beats GPT-4 on Code Generation
title_cn: Mistral发布Codestral Pro：22B模型代码能力超越GPT-4
summary: French AI lab Mistral has released Codestral Pro, a 22B parameter model specialized for code generation. Despite its smaller size, it outperforms GPT-4 on HumanEval and SWE-Bench.
